'''Twin Suns Station''', also known as '''Twin Sun Service Station''' and '''Twin Sun Station''', was a service platform in the [[Garis sector/Legends|Garis sector's]] [[Roccus system]], owned and operated by the [[Azzameen family]] and used by the family's [[Merchant/Legends|shipping]] company [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]]. Often, the family referred to the station as the "family repair yard".

==Description==
[[File:TwinSunVid2.jpg|thumb|left|[[Antan Azzameen]] watches from inside Twin Suns Station's command center.]]
Twin Suns Station was one of the principal business locations of the Azzameen-owned [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]] company. Various vessels, such as [[MB-C1 medium transport]]s, [[container transport]]s or [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transports]], were commonly seen using ''Twin Suns Station's'' facilities.<ref name="XWA" />

==Facilities==
[[File:Otss.jpg|thumb|left|''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' approaches Twin Suns Station.]]

Constructed by the [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]], the station combined elements of both the [[Telgorn shipyard]] and the [[Repair Yard|Telgorn repair yard]]. It possessed drydock facilities for two large starships, as well as two pressurized hangars for smaller shuttlecraft, [[Transport/Legends|transports]] or utility craft.

Twin Suns Station was not armed with any offensive weaponry, though it was equipped with a moderately powerful shield. Because of the high volume of traffic passing through the station at any given time, ''Twin Suns Station'' used a pair of small [[sensor globe]]s to monitor and allocate appropriate queuing slots for craft awaiting servicing.

==History==
[[File:TwinSunVid3.jpg|thumb|left|The ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' flies through ''Twin Suns Station'' after a run-in with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces near [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].]]''Twin Suns Station'' had been part of the Azzameen family business since well before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

When, against Antan's vehement advice, [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas]] and [[Galin Azzameen/Legends|Galin Azzameen]] took a consignment of bacta in the family [[YT-2000 light freighter/Legends|YT-2000]] transport ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' to [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], they were caught in the sudden Imperial assault on that world. Suffering minor damage in a skirmish with [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] launched from the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|Corrupter]], the ''Otana'' escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Unfortunately, Galin discovered that the damage was more severe than they initially thought, and that the resultant coolant leak meant than it would be prudent to stop at ''Twin Suns Station''. However, Antan was unimpressed with their reckless behavior in contacting the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], and refused to give preferential treatment to the ''Otana'' on the pretext that it would be bad for business to bump customers waiting for service. Tomaas and Galin were left with no choice but to return to [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Azzameen Home Base]] in their damaged condition.<ref name="XWA" />

Later, following the apparent deaths of Tomaas and Galin and the branding of the Azzameen family as outlaws, [[Aeron Azzameen|Aeron]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] visited the station once more in order to retrieve some documents from a safe and a container of warheads before making their escape to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. During their hurried visit, the [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Furious (Victory II-class)|''Furious'']] arrived and launched fighters and boarding craft to seize the station.<ref name="XWA" />
